summary: Current note is fully accurate. All four code_refs (Pipecat Vonage DTX client.py:84-95, Pipecat SmallWebRTC connection.py:315, LiveKit AudioStreamDecoder decoder.py:336ff, Rapida types.go:16 + streamer.go:174) and the Deepgram ebook quote (~2060-2062) match ground truth at the cited lines. The note correctly frames Rapida (=voice-ai clone) as the exception that sets useinbandfec=1 in application code, and its self-flagged (Unverified: aiortc FEC defaults) caveat is honest since aiortc is outside the clone set. NOTE: a stale prior verdict JSON existed for an earlier draft (which had MISCITED decoder.py:58, deepgram ~2075, and a WRONG 'no clone configures FEC' thesis); the note has since been corrected and now passes.
